content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the lineage display changes across src/cli/task.rs, src/cli/project.rs, src/cli/run.rs, src/contexts/project_run_record/queries.rs, and tests/cli.rs. The implementation is correct: `--json` flag added to task show / project show (both emit ProjectDetail via serde); `RunStatusJsonView` gained nullable `milestone_id`/`bead_id` populated via `apply_run_status_lineage` (covering both the stale and non-stale paths); `run status` text emits `Milestone: X | Bead: Y` only when both labels are present so non-milestone tasks are unaffected; `run history` JSON adds `bead_id` to every event/payload/artifact, and text output appends `(bead=...)` only when a bead_id exists (empty suffix otherwise preserves legacy formatting). Lineage resolution gracefully falls back to IDs when milestone metadata is unavailable via `<milestone metadata unavailable>` detection. `cargo build`, `cargo fmt --check`, and the targeted test set (run_status, project_show, task_show, run_history plus the 1063 lib tests) all pass on the working tree. Pre-existing clippy errors on this repo are present on master and unrelated to this bead. No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found.

## Amendments

None.
